title: German Mushroom Pilaf
description: A hearty and flavorful German-inspired pilaf dish with sautéed mushrooms and a hint of sourness.

ingredients.name: german pilaf
ingredients.notes: any type of pilaf will work

instructions: Heat butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add chopped onion and sauté until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add mushrooms and continue to sauté until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Add pilaf and stir to combine with onion and mushroom mixture.
If using sour cream, stir it in at this point.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until pilaf is lightly toasted.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Optional: top with chopped fresh herbs like parsley or chives.
